2233-attack-on-the-uss-kelvin-the-romula: The Narada, displaced from 2387, destroys the USS Kelvin; Captain Robau dies aboard the Romulan ship.
2233-erica-ortegas-is-born-in-barranquil: Erica Ortegas born in Barranquilla, Colombia.
2233-james-tiberius-kirk-is-born-to-geor: James T. Kirk born in Riverside, Iowa, to George and Winona Kirk.
2233-the-federation-survey-ship-uss-kelv: The survey ship USS Kelvin patrols 75,000 kilometres off the Federation–Klingon border.
2234-the-ap-350-is-developed-by-a-zigwel: A Zigwel Orgon develops the AP 350.
2234-una-chin-riley-begins-her-starfleet: Una Chin-Riley enters Starfleet, and will not speak to Neera Ketoul again for twenty-five years.
2235-on-vulcan-the-young-spock-makes-a-p: A young Spock plays a prank, and is taunted by other Vulcan children over his human parentage.
2236-a-klingon-terror-raid-on-doctari-al: A Klingon raid on Doctari Alpha orphans Michael Burnham and destroys the experimental Red Angel suit.
2236-amanda-grayson-and-michael-burnham-: Amanda Grayson takes Michael Burnham to a book exchange on a moon of Eridani D for her tenth birthday.
2236-following-this-incident-burnham-dec: Burnham flees Sarek's home into Vulcan's Forge; her mother, reaching back through time, guides Spock to her.
2236-sometime-later-the-vulcan-learning-: Logic extremists bomb the Vulcan Learning Center; Sarek revives Michael Burnham using his katra.
2236-the-anti-food-replication-movement-: The Anti-Food Replication Movement is active this year.
2236-the-ss-columbia-expedition-from-the: The SS Columbia crashes on Talos IV; Vina alone survives the expedition.
2237-after-playing-a-practical-joke-on-s: Spock earns a reputation as a prankster in his home city of ShiKahr.
2237-in-an-alternate-timeline-spock-is-k: In an alternate timeline Spock dies as a child, Amanda leaves Sarek, and she later dies at Lunaport.
2237-in-yet-another-timeline-spock-lives: In a further variant timeline, both Spock and his sehlat I-Chaya survive.
2237-spock-is-tested-mentally-and-physic: Spock undergoes the kahs-wan survival ordeal on Vulcan.
2237-t-pring-is-betrothed-to-spock-throu: T'Pring and Spock are bonded as children through a mind meld.
2237-the-ba-ul-of-planet-kaminar-become-: The Ba'ul of Kaminar achieve warp capability.
2237-the-pet-sehlat-i-chaya-given-to-spo: I-Chaya, the sehlat Sarek gave Spock, dies defending the boy from a le-matya.
2237-the-uss-enterprise-on-a-return-flig: The USS Enterprise passes briefly through this year while slingshotting back to 2267.
2239-the-uss-archimedes-makes-first-cont: The USS Archimedes makes first contact with the Ba'ul, answering a signal sent by the Kelpien Saru.
2240-me-hani-ika-hali-ka-po-is-born: Me Hani Ika Hali Ka Po born.
2241-another-starship-disappears-near-th: A further starship vanishes near the Taurean system.
2241-montgomery-scott-joins-starfleet-an: Montgomery Scott enters Starfleet, beginning fifty-two years of engineering service across eleven ships.
2241-pavel-chekov-is-born-to-andrei-chek: Pavel Chekov born, four years ahead of his prime-timeline counterpart.
2242-vader-a-resident-of-the-caldos-colo: Vader, of the Caldos colony, dies on 23 September.
2243-richard-daystrom-invents-the-duotro: Richard Daystrom invents duotronic computing, winning the Nobel and Zee-Magnees Prizes.
2244-one-of-the-human-males-examined-by-: Birth of one of the Omicron colonists later examined by Leonard McCoy.
2244-straal-and-paul-stamets-begin-worki: Straal and Paul Stamets begin their collaboration.
2245-emony-dax-visits-earth-to-judge-a-g: Emony Dax judges a gymnastics meet at the University of Mississippi and steers a young Leonard McCoy toward medicine.
2245-in-an-alternate-timeline-the-enterp: In an alternate timeline, the Enterprise launches from the Luna Shipyards.
2245-michael-burnham-begins-attending-th: Michael Burnham becomes the first human admitted to the Vulcan Science Academy.
2245-pavel-chekov-is-born-to-andrei-chek: Pavel Chekov born in Russia to Andrei Chekov.
2245-the-inconclusive-battle-of-donatu-v: Federation and Klingon forces fight to a draw at Donatu V, near Sherman's Planet.
2245-the-uss-constellation-ncc-1017-is-l: The USS Constellation launches under Captain Matthew Decker, beginning the first of three five-year missions.
2245-the-uss-enterprise-ncc-1701-is-laun: The USS Enterprise launches from the San Francisco Fleet Yards under Captain Robert April, with Sarah April as chief medical officer and Christopher Pike as first officer.
2249-michael-burnham-graduates-from-the-: Michael Burnham leaves the Vulcan Science Academy for a seven-year posting aboard the USS Shenzhou under Philippa Georgiou.
2249-spock-declines-his-admission-to-the: Spock refuses a Vulcan Science Academy place after a minister calls his human mother a disadvantage, and enlists in Starfleet.
2250-spock-graduates-starfleet-academy-w: Spock leaves Starfleet Academy as an ensign, having chosen it over the Vulcan Science Academy against Sarek's wishes.
2253-spock-is-assigned-to-the-uss-enterp: Spock joins the USS Enterprise as science officer.
2254-spock-begins-programming-the: Spock begins programming the Kobayashi Maru scenario.
2255-james-t-kirk-gets-in-a-bar-fight-wi: Kirk brawls with Hendorff and other cadets in a Riverside bar; Christopher Pike breaks it up and urges him to enlist.
2255-leonard-mccoy-gets-divorced-from-hi: Newly divorced, Leonard McCoy enlists and meets Kirk aboard the same transport.
2255-several-starfleet-academy-cadets-in: Starfleet cadets including Nyota Uhura and Hendorff pass through Riverside.
2255-the-uss-enterprise-undergoes-constr: The USS Enterprise is under construction at the Riverside Shipyard in Iowa.
2257-august-montgomery-scott-and-keenser: Montgomery Scott and Keenser are posted to the Federation outpost on Delta Vega.
2257-spock-takes-a-leave-of-absence-from: Spock takes leave and admits himself to the psychiatric ward on Starbase 5, then escapes by shuttle amid accusations of murder.
2258-admiral-alexander-marcus-discovers-: Alexander Marcus finds the SS Botany Bay and presses Khan Noonien Singh into Starfleet service as John Harrison.
2258-christopher-pike-returns-to-the-ent: Christopher Pike resumes command of the Enterprise.
2258-the-uss-discovery-travels-to-3189-v: The USS Discovery passes through a wormhole to the year 3189.
2258-under-the-command-of-james-t-kirk-t: Kirk takes the Enterprise out with the crew who helped him stop Nero.
2259-as-of-this-year-the-ketha-province-: The Ketha Province has stood empty for decades by this point.
2259-at-starfleet-headquarters-marcus-co: Harrison attacks a Starfleet summit, killing Pike, then escapes by transwarp beam to Qo'noS.
2259-both-damaged-ships-begin-falling-to: Kirk dies repairing the Enterprise's warp core as both ships fall toward Earth.
2259-january-the-crew-of-the-uss-enterpr: The Enterprise crew are caught up in the Mudd Incident and seize a K'normian trading ship.
2259-john-harrison-coerces-thomas-harewo: Harrison forces Section 31 agent Thomas Harewood to bomb the Kelvin Memorial Archive in London.
2259-stardate-1224-3-the-enterprise-trav: The Enterprise investigates an abandoned Illyrian colony on Hetemit IX, stranding Pike and Spock planetside.
2259-this-is-the-year-james-t-kirk-was-e: The year Kirk would have finished the Academy had he taken the usual four years.
2259-two-weeks-later-kirk-is-fully-reviv: Kirk recovers, and Khan is returned to cryogenic storage.
2260-carol-marcus-officially-joins-the-e: Carol Marcus formally joins the Enterprise crew.
2260-following-extensive-repairs-the-uss: Repaired, the Enterprise sets out on a five-year exploratory mission.
2260-nearly-a-year-after-stardate-2259-5: A recovered Kirk speaks on Federation principles at a memorial ceremony.
2260-the-enterprise-s-first-day-in-deep-: The Enterprise's first day in deep space.
2262-stardate-2262-18-january-18-james-t: Kirk records a captain's log entry.
2262-stardate-2262-248-september-5-james: Kirk records a further captain's log entry.
2263-a-peace-offering-to-the-teenaxi-del: Kirk's attempt to broker peace between the Fibonan Republic and the Teenaxi Delegation collapses.
2263-ambassador-spock-dies-on-new-vulcan: Ambassador Spock dies on New Vulcan.
2263-construction-for-the-uss-enterprise: A new USS Enterprise begins construction at Starbase Yorktown.
2263-james-t-kirk-celebrates-his-30th-bi: Kirk marks his thirtieth birthday at a surprise party, toasting the Enterprise and its dead.
2263-jaylah-is-offered-aceeptance-into-s: Jaylah is admitted to Starfleet Academy on Kirk's recommendation.
2263-krall-launches-an-assault-on-starba: Krall's assault on Starbase Yorktown is broken by the Enterprise crew flying the salvaged Franklin.
2263-montgomery-scott-is-led-to-the-long: Jaylah leads Montgomery Scott to the intact USS Franklin on Altamid.
2263-spock-goes-through-a-cache-of-items: Among Ambassador Spock's effects, Spock finds a photograph of the Enterprise senior crew from the other timeline.
2263-the-enterprise-is-destroyed-by-kral: Krall's swarm ships destroy the Enterprise over Altamid.
2263-the-uss-enterprise-makes-a-reprovis: The Enterprise puts in at Yorktown Station to resupply.
2264-in-an-alternate-timeline-captain-ja: In an alternate timeline, Kirk commands the USS Enterprise.
2265-a-bottle-from-this-year-s-vintage-o: A Dom Pérignon of this vintage is kept back to christen the Enterprise-B in 2293.
2265-a-new-uniform-is-introduced-for-sta: Starfleet introduces a new uniform, worn alongside the older style into the 2270s.
2265-captain-james-t-kirk-assumes-comman: Kirk takes command of the Enterprise for a five-year mission of exploration.
2265-the-borg-swarm-through-the-el-auria: The Borg overrun the El-Aurian homeworld, scattering survivors across the galaxy.
2266-dr-leonard-mccoy-replaces-dr-mark-p: Leonard McCoy succeeds Mark Piper as the Enterprise's chief medical officer.
2267-ensign-pavel-chekov-joins-the-crew-: Ensign Pavel Chekov joins the Enterprise, becoming chief navigator within the year.
2267-nimbus-iii-is-jointly-established-a: The Federation, Romulans and Klingons jointly found Nimbus III as a planet of galactic peace.
2268-ceti-alpha-vi-explodes-and-turns-th: Ceti Alpha VI explodes, leaving neighbouring Ceti Alpha V a wasteland.
2268-the-defiant-is-discovered-by-the-us: The Enterprise finds the Defiant adrift in Tholian interphase, her crew dead by mass insanity.
2270-kirk-is-promoted-to-admiral-and-bec: Kirk is promoted to admiral and made Chief of Starfleet Operations.
2270-leonard-mccoy-also-retires-from-sta: Leonard McCoy leaves Starfleet for private practice on Earth.
2270-spock-retires-from-starfleet-and-re: Spock resigns and returns to Vulcan to attempt Kolinahr.
2270-will-decker-is-promoted-to-captain-: Will Decker is made captain of the Enterprise.
2275-a-group-of-young-ba-ku-wanting-to-f: Young Ba'ku who tried to seize the colony are exiled after their attempt fails.
2281-james-t-kirk-sees-demora-sulu-for-t: Kirk sees Demora Sulu for the last time before 2293.
2282-in-idaho-on-earth-james-t-kirk-take: Riding one of his uncle's horses in Idaho, Kirk meets Antonia.
2284-carol-marcus-sends-a-next-phase-pro: Carol Marcus submits the next-phase proposal for Project Genesis.
2284-james-t-kirk-tells-antonia-his-plan: Kirk tells Antonia he intends to return to Starfleet.
2285-admiral-kirk-steals-the-uss-enterpr: Kirk steals the Enterprise to retrieve the revived Spock; Kruge's Bird-of-Prey destroys the USS Grissom.
2285-following-the-death-of-torias-in-a-: After Torias dies in a shuttle crash, the Dax symbiont is joined to Joran.
2285-project-genesis-enters-its-third-st: Project Genesis reaches its third stage, and the USS Reliant surveys the Ceti Alpha system for a test site.
2285-the-uss-excelsior-starfleet-s-first: The USS Excelsior, first of her class, is commissioned.
2286-after-spending-three-months-in-exil: After three months' exile on Vulcan, Kirk and his crew stand trial over Genesis; all but one charge is dropped and Kirk is demoted.
2286-an-alien-probe-dubbed-the-whale-pro: An alien probe cripples Starfleet and Klingon ships and wrecks Earth's weather while calling out to humpback whales.
2286-the-uss-enterprise-is-launched-unde: The USS Enterprise-A is launched under Kirk's command.
2286-the-yorktown-under-the-command-of-c: The Yorktown, under Joel Randolph, is among the ships disabled by the probe near Sol.
2286-while-patrolling-sector-5-of-the-ne: The Saratoga meets the unidentified probe while patrolling Sector 5 of the Neutral Zone.
2287-after-the-journey-to-sha-ka-ree-the: The Enterprise-A senior staff pose for a bridge photograph that Spock keeps for the rest of his life.
2287-captain-james-t-kirk-and-the-crew-o: Kirk's crew are recalled to duty; Sybok seizes the Enterprise and drives her through the Great Barrier.
2287-james-t-kirk-spock-and-leonard-mcco: On leave at Yosemite, Kirk falls from El Capitan and is caught by Spock.
2287-spock-s-half-brother-the-renegade-v: Sybok, Spock's half-brother, seizes the Federation, Klingon and Romulan ambassadors on Nimbus III.
2290-hikaru-sulu-begins-a-three-year-mis: Hikaru Sulu begins a three-year survey of gaseous anomalies in the Beta Quadrant.
2293-doing-his-part-to-save-the-enterpri: Kirk is lost saving the Enterprise-B from the Nexus on her maiden voyage.
2293-the-excelsior-is-struck-by-a-powerf: A shock wave from Praxis strikes the Excelsior, and Sulu reports the disaster to Starfleet.
2293-the-khitomer-conference-takes-place: The Khitomer Conference opens nearly a century of Federation–Klingon peace, with Curzon Dax among the negotiators.
2293-the-nexus-a-powerful-destructive-en: The Federation first encounters the Nexus energy ribbon during the Enterprise-B's maiden voyage.
2293-the-uss-enterprise-is-commissioned-: The USS Enterprise-B is commissioned under Captain John Harriman.
2293-uss-enterprise-departs-the-spacedoc: Kirk and McCoy are framed for Chancellor Gorkon's assassination after the Enterprise meets Kronos One.
2304-upon-entering-pon-farr-tuvok-leaves: Entering pon farr, Tuvok abandons Kolinahr and marries T'Pel.
2305-july-13th-jean-luc-picard-is-born-i: Jean-Luc Picard born in La Barre, France.
2311-a-conflict-between-the-federation-a: The Tomed Incident between the Federation and the Romulans leads to the Treaty of Algeron.
2314-the-uss-stratford-under-the-command: The USS Stratford is destroyed; Starfleet Intelligence suspects the Minosian High Council.
2323-april-picard-participates-in-the-fo: Picard wins the Starfleet Academy marathon on Danula II, the first freshman ever to do so.
2324-beverly-howard-is-born-in-copernicu: Beverly Howard born in Copernicus City on Luna.
2325-the-son-a-subdue-the-tarlac-and-the: The Son'a conquer the Tarlac and the Ellora and press them into a labour class.
2327-the-class-of-2327-graduates-from-st: Picard, Marta Batanides and Cortan Zweller graduate from Starfleet Academy.
2328-miles-o-brien-is-born-in-ireland-to: Miles O'Brien born in Ireland to Michael O'Brien.
2329-chakotay-is-born-on-trebus-near-wha: Chakotay born on Trebus, near what becomes the Cardassian Demilitarized Zone.
2332-benjamin-sisko-the-son-of-joseph-an: Benjamin Sisko born in New Orleans to Joseph and Sarah Sisko.
2332-the-nexus-returns-to-the-milky-way-: The Nexus passes through the galaxy again, thirty-nine years after taking Kirk.
2333-during-a-historic-battle-involving-: Picard takes command of the USS Stargazer in battle after her captain is killed.
2335-august-19th-william-t-riker-is-born: William T. Riker born in Alaska.
2335-february-16th-geordi-la-forge-is-bo: Geordi La Forge born in Mogadishu, Somalia.
2336-data-is-built-on-omicron-theta-and-: Data is built on Omicron Theta and begins his pursuit of humanity.
2336-march-29th-deanna-troi-is-born-near: Deanna Troi born near Lake El'nar on Betazed.
2337-natasha-yar-is-born-on-turkana-iv: Natasha Yar born on Turkana IV.
2340-worf-son-of-mogh-is-born-on-qo-nos: Worf, son of Mogh, born on Qo'noS.
2344-annika-hansen-is-born-on-the-tendar: Annika Hansen born on the Tendara colony.
2350-benjamin-sisko-and-solok-enter-star: Benjamin Sisko and Solok enter Starfleet Academy.
2351-the-duras-sisters-bird-of-prey-is-c: The Duras sisters' Bird-of-Prey is commissioned.
2352-natasha-yar-flees-from-the-failed-h: Natasha Yar escapes the collapsed human colony on Turkana IV.
2353-jack-r-crusher-dies-on-an-away-miss: Jack Crusher dies on an away mission; his captain, Picard, carries the news to Beverly.
2353-william-t-riker-and-geordi-la-forge: William Riker and Geordi La Forge enter Starfleet Academy.
2354-benjamin-sisko-and-solok-graduate-f: Sisko and Solok graduate from the Academy; Sisko meets Jennifer at Gilgo Beach soon after.
2355-in-what-later-became-known-as-the-b: At the Battle of Maxia a Ferengi vessel cripples the Stargazer, forcing Picard to abandon ship.
2355-jake-sisko-is-born-son-of-benjamin-: Jake Sisko born to Benjamin and Jennifer Sisko.
2363-artim-is-born-on-the-ba-ku-planet: Artim born on the Ba'ku planet.
2363-jean-luc-picard-assumes-command-of-: Picard takes command of the Enterprise.
2363-prior-to-formally-taking-command-of: Before formally taking command, Picard picks his senior staff, choosing Riker as first officer alongside La Forge and Yar.
2364-parasitic-beings-infiltrate-starfle: Parasitic aliens infiltrate Starfleet Command; Quinn and Satie expose the plot and Beverly Crusher finds a way to remove the creatures.
2364-several-federation-and-romulan-outp: Outposts on both sides of the Romulan Neutral Zone are destroyed, each power suspecting the other.
2364-the-uss-enterprise-d-under-the-comm: The USS Enterprise-D leaves Earth under Picard for her first mission, to Farpoint Station.
2365-captain-jean-luc-picard-helps-to-de: Picard's defence of Data against Bruce Maddox's plan to dismantle him helps establish the rights of artificial life.
2365-the-united-federation-of-planets-ma: Q flings the Enterprise-D seven thousand light years to System J-25, giving the Federation its first sight of the Borg.
2366-b-elanna-torres-enters-starfleet-ac: B'Elanna Torres enters Starfleet Academy, and speaks to her mother Miral for the last time before the Delta Quadrant.
2367-benjamin-sisko-attends-a-starfleet-: Benjamin Sisko attends a Starfleet briefing about Q.
2367-the-uss-enterprise-is-severely-dama: Crippled attacking a Borg cube, the Enterprise misses the fleet at Wolf 359; Riker is field-promoted to captain.
2367-this-year-marks-the-passage-of-the-: A century passes since Spock mused about returning to Ceti Alpha V.
2369-another-variant-of-the-starfleet-un: Starfleet issues another uniform variant, black but for division colour at the shoulders.
2370-a-group-of-federation-colony-worlds: Federation colonists who reject the Cardassian treaty take up arms as the Maquis.
2370-b-elanna-torres-joins-the-maquis-af: Chakotay saves B'Elanna Torres's life, and she joins the Maquis.
2370-kathryn-janeway-is-chosen-to-comman: Kathryn Janeway is given command of the USS Voyager.
2371-captain-james-t-kirk-emerges-from-t: Kirk leaves the Nexus and dies helping Picard stop Soran from destroying the Veridian system.
2371-dr-tolian-soran-uses-a-trilithium-w: Tolian Soran collapses the Amargosa star with a trilithium solar probe.
2371-robert-picard-and-his-son-ren-die-i: A fire at the family home in La Barre kills Robert Picard and his son René.
2371-starfleet-introduces-a-new-combadge: Starfleet adopts a new combadge, a gold rectangle around a cut-out oval.
2371-the-enterprise-is-destroyed-over-ve: The Enterprise-D is lost over Veridian III, most of the crew surviving the saucer's crash landing.
2371-worf-is-promoted-to-lieutenant-comm: Worf is promoted to lieutenant commander.
2372-starfleet-detects-unusual-activity-: Unusual activity is picked up along the Romulan Neutral Zone.
2372-the-uss-enterprise-is-launched-from: The USS Enterprise-E is launched from the San Francisco Fleet Yards.
2373-starfleet-command-declares-voyager-: Starfleet declares Voyager lost with all hands; Janeway begins writing letters home.
2373-starfleet-introduces-a-new-uniform-: Starfleet rolls out a new uniform, with quilted grey shoulders and division colour on the undershirt and cuffs.
2373-the-dominion-invades-the-alpha-quad: The Dominion invades the Alpha Quadrant.
2373-the-second-major-borg-incursion-the: The Borg's second incursion is broken at the Battle of Sector 001, and the Enterprise-E follows a sphere back to 2063.
2374-the-crew-of-the-uss-voyager-enter-b: Voyager helps the Borg drive Species 8472 back into fluidic space, gaining Seven of Nine in the aftermath.
2374-the-nel-bato-conference-is-held-whe: At the Nel Bato Conference, Picard meets Hars Adislo and his paper on thermionic transconductance.
2374-voyager-briefly-reestablishes-conta: Voyager briefly reaches the Alpha Quadrant over a Hirogen network, and some of the crew receive letters from home.
2375-admiral-dougherty-of-starfleet-and-: Admiral Dougherty and the Son'a try to remove the Ba'ku to harvest their rings' metaphasic radiation, and Picard intervenes.
2375-commanders-william-t-riker-and-dean: William Riker and Deanna Troi resume their relationship.
2375-the-evora-become-protectorate-membe: The Evora become a Federation protectorate.
2375-the-uss-sao-paulo-is-renamed-the-us: The USS Sao Paulo is renamed Defiant under Benjamin Sisko.
2378-miral-paris-daughter-of-b-elanna-to: B'Elanna Torres and Tom Paris's daughter Miral is born as Voyager reaches home.
2379-after-the-death-of-shinzon-the-init: Shinzon's death clears the way for continued Federation–Romulan rapprochement.
2379-captain-jean-luc-picard-is-ordered-: Picard is sent to Romulus after a coup installs a new government offering peace.
2379-evidence-suggests-but-other-interpr: Evidence suggests Wesley Crusher had returned to Starfleet as a lieutenant junior grade by this year.
2379-kathryn-janeway-is-a-vice-admiral-s: Kathryn Janeway serves as a vice admiral at Starfleet Command.
2379-the-enterprise-e-is-towed-back-to-e: The damaged Enterprise-E is towed home to Earth for repair.
2379-the-shuttlecraft-argo-is-tested-for: The shuttlecraft Argo is first tested on Kolarus III, where Soong's prototype B-4 is found.
2379-the-uss-archer-uss-aries-uss-galaxy: Seven starships form Battle Group Omega to reinforce the Enterprise.
2379-william-riker-is-promoted-to-captai: Riker is promoted to captain of the Titan, with Troi transferring as counsellor.
2379-william-t-riker-and-deanna-troi-are: Riker and Troi marry on Earth; the Betazed ceremony is cut short by the summons to Romulus.
2381-beverly-crusher-leaves-the-enterpri: Beverly Crusher steps away from the Enterprise to bring up her son Jack.
2382-the-protostar-is-launched-from-the-: The Protostar launches from the San Francisco Fleet Yards under Chakotay, with Adreek-Hu as first officer.
2385-compromised-synthetics-are-used-by-: Synthetics compromised by the Zhat Vash set Mars ablaze and destroy the Utopia Planitia Fleet Yards.
2385-the-crew-prevent-asencia-from-using: The crew stop Asencia's time-space weapons and return the Protostar to its place in the timeline.
2386-having-been-captured-and-taken-to-v: Icheb is stripped of his Borg components by Bjayzl on Vergessen, and Seven of Nine ends his suffering.
2387-ambassador-spock-plans-to-pilot-a-s: Spock prepares a red-matter ship to collapse the Romulan supernova into an artificial black hole.
2387-spock-launches-red-matter-into-the-: Spock's red matter neutralises the supernova, and the resulting black hole swallows his ship and Nero's.
2401-separate-from-jurati-s-borg-the-ori: The Borg Collective plots to assimilate Starfleet from within on Frontier Day, using Changelings as infiltrators.
2401-seven-of-nine-is-promoted-to-captai: Seven of Nine is promoted to captain.
